scripts.build: npm run build -w @naughtybox/backend && npm run build -w @naughtybox/streaming && npm run build -w @naughtybox/frontend
scripts.build:ci: npm run build -w @naughtybox/shared-types && npm run build -w @naughtybox/backend && npm run build -w @naughtybox/streaming && npm run build -w @naughtybox/frontend
scripts.test:smokes: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\smoke-current-state.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\smoke-security.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\smoke-creator-verification.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\smoke-broadcast-session.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\smoke-provider-webhooks.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\smoke-payout-rail.ps1
scripts.validate:all: npm run clean:dist && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build:ci && npm run test:units && npm run refresh:runtime && npm run test:smokes
